---
title: "Competition for Hearts and Minds"
date: 2020-03
author:
  - name: Kadir Jun Ayhan
    url: https://kjayhan.github.io
    orcid: 0000-0001-8052-1938
    affiliation: Ewha Womans University Graduate School of International Studies
categories: [public diplomacy, foreign policy, international relations, diplomacy, 2020]
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Kadir Jun Ayhan*</strong> (2020), "Competition for Hearts and Minds: Cold War Public Diplomacy," <em>International Studies Review</em>: 22(4): 988-989, doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1093/isr/viaa038"><code>10.1093/isr/viaa038</code></a>
doi: 10.1093/isr/viaa038
#image:
#draft: true
---

## Book review

Parker Jason C. [Hearts, Minds, Voices: U.S. Cold War Public Diplomacy and the Formation of the Third World](https://academic.oup.com/book/4541). New York, United States:  Oxford University Press,  2016.  240 pp., $34.38 hardcover (ISBN: 978-0190251840).

## BibTeX citation

``` bibtex
@article{ayhan_competition_2020,
	title = {Competition for {Hearts} and {Minds}: {Cold} {War} {Public} {Diplomacy}},
	volume = {22},
	issn = {1521-9488},
	doi = {10.1093/isr/viaa038},
	number = {4},
	urldate = {2022-09-04},
	journal = {International Studies Review},
	author = {Ayhan, Kadir Jun},
	year = {2020},
	pages = {988--989},
}
```
